name: DeployKit
shortDescription: DeployKit - Delta update tool for .NET desktop apps
fullDescription:
# DeployKit 冒聼職聙

**Self-hosted update distribution server** for desktop applications. Each developer deploys their own instance 芒聙聰 no central hosting, full control.

![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/dahakabdellah12/DeployKit)
![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/dahakabdellah12/DeployKit)
![.NET](https://img.shields.io/badge/.NET-8.0-512BD4)
![Docker](https://img.shields.io/badge/docker-ready-2496ED)

---

## Features

- **Self-hosted** 芒聙聰 Deploy on your own server (Docker, Render, VPS)
- **Dashboard** 芒聙聰 Web UI to register apps, generate API keys, upload updates
- **Update API** 芒聙聰 Public endpoints for client apps to check / retrieve updates
- **Secure** 芒聙聰 BCrypt passwords, Bearer token auth, rate limiting, CSP headers, audit logging, account lockout
- **Lightweight** 芒聙聰 SQLite database, single Docker container (~200 MB)
- **Cross-platform** 芒聙聰 Works on Windows, Linux, macOS
- **NuGet SDK** 芒聙聰 One-line integration for WPF desktop apps

---

## Quick Start

### Docker (recommended)

```bash
git clone git@github.com:dahakabdellah12/DeployKit.git
cd DeployKit
docker compose up -d
```

Open `http://localhost:5000` and create your admin account.

 Data persists in a Docker volume (`deploykit-data`) at `/data`.

### Deploy to Render

1. Fork / push this repo to GitHub
2. Create a **Web Service** on Render 芒聠聮 connect your repo
3. Choose **Docker** as the environment
4. Add a **Disk** mount at `/data` (1 GB)
5. Deploy 芒聙聰 Render detects `render.yaml` automatically

### Manual (.NET CLI)

```bash
dotnet publish DeployKit.Cloud.Api -c Release -o out
ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://0.0.0.0:5000 dotnet out/DeployKit.Cloud.Api.dll
```

Set `DataPath` and `ConnectionStrings__Sqlite` for persistent storage.

---

## Usage

### First Run

1. Open the dashboard URL in your browser
2. Create the admin account (username + password)
3. Register your first app 芒聠聮 get an **API Key**
4. Upload an update package

 **Single-user per instance.** Each developer hosts their own server.

### Client Integration (WPF)

Install the SDK:

```bash
dotnet add package DeployKit.Integration
```

Add one line to `App.xaml.cs`:

```csharp
DeployKit.Integration.DeployKit.Configure(YOUR_API_KEY, https://your-server.com);
```

Thats it. Updates are checked automatically and users are prompted to update.

### API 芒聙聰 Check for Updates

```
GET /v1/check?X-Api-Key=YOUR_APP_KEYv=1.0.0
```

```json
{
  hasUpdate: true,
  latestVersion: 1.1.0,
  downloadUrl: https://...,
  packageHash: sha256hex...,
  isMandatory: false,
  releaseNotes: Bug fixes and improvements
}
```

---

## API Reference

### Public Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Rate Limit | Description |
|--------|------|------|------------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/v1/check` | `X-Api-Key` | 100/min | Check for updates |
| `GET` | `/v1/version` | `X-Api-Key` | 100/min | Get latest version |
| `GET` | `/v1/admin/status` | None | 100/min | Check if admin exists |

### Authenticated Endpoints (Bearer token)

| Method | Path | Rate Limit | Description |
|--------|------|------------|-------------|
| `POST` | `/v1/admin/setup` | 5/min | Create admin account |
| `POST` | `/v1/admin/login` | 5/min | Login |
| `POST` | `/v1/admin/refresh` | 30/min | Extend token expiry |
| `POST` | `/v1/admin/logout` | 30/min | Invalidate token |
| `POST` | `/v1/admin/register` | 30/min | Register a new app |
| `GET` | `/v1/admin/apps` | 30/min | List apps |
| `GET` | `/v1/admin/apps/{key}` | 30/min | App details + packages |
| `DELETE` | `/v1/admin/apps/{key}` | 30/min | Delete app |
| `POST` | `/v1/admin/apps/{key}/regenerate-key` | 30/min | Regenerate API key |
| `GET` | `/v1/admin/packages/{id}` | 30/min | Get package details |
| `PATCH` | `/v1/admin/packages/{id}` | 30/min | Update package |
| `DELETE` | `/v1/admin/packages/{id}` | 30/min | Delete package |
| `POST` | `/v1/upload` | 10/min | Upload new version |

---

## Security

| Control | Implementation |
|---------|---------------|
| **Passwords** | BCrypt (no minimum length / complexity) |
| **Auth tokens** | GUID, 8-hour expiry, sliding extension on each request |
| **Account lockout** | 5 failed attempts 芒聠聮 15-minute lock |
| **Rate limiting** | Sliding window per endpoint group |
| **CSP** | `default-src self`, `script-src self`, `style-src self unsafe-inline` |
| **HSTS** | Enabled |
| **Headers** | `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`, `X-Frame-Options: DENY`, `Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin` |
| **Audit log** | All admin actions logged (IP, timestamp, user) |
| **Data encryption** | DPAPI with random 16-byte entropy (per-machine) |
| **Package integrity** | SHA256 hash verification on download and extraction |
| **Body limit** | 100 MB max request body |

---

## Project Structure

```
DeployKit/
芒聰聹芒聰聙芒聰聙 DeployKit.Cloud.Api/     # Server 芒聙聰 ASP.NET Core Minimal API
芒聰聜   芒聰聹芒聰聙芒聰聙 Endpoints/           # API route handlers
芒聰聜   芒聰聹芒聰聙芒聰聙 Helpers/
features: **Self-hosted** 芒聙聰 Deploy on your own server (Docker, Render, VPS)
**Dashboard** 芒聙聰 Web UI to register apps, generate API keys, upload updates
**Update API** 芒聙聰 Public endpoints for client apps to check / retrieve updates
**Secure** 芒聙聰 BCrypt passwords, Bearer token auth, rate limiting, CSP headers, audit logging, account lockout
**Lightweight** 芒聙聰 SQLite database, single Docker container (~200 MB)
**Cross-platform** 芒聙聰 Works on Windows, Linux, macOS
**NuGet SDK** 芒聙聰 One-line integration for WPF desktop apps

name: Wifi-Keys
shortDescription: .NET MAUI Android app for WiFi password recovery using fh_/wlan character substitution algorithm. Arabic/English/French. Dark/Light theme.
fullDescription:
# Wifi-Keys

脴陋脴路脴篓脵聤脵聜 Android 脵聞脴搂脵聝脴陋脴麓脴搂脵聛 脴麓脴篓脵聝脴搂脴陋 WiFi 脴搂脵聞脵聜脴卤脵聤脴篓脴漏 脵聢脴搂脴鲁脴陋脴庐脴卤脴搂脴卢 脵聝脵聞脵聟脴搂脴陋 脴搂脵聞脵聟脴卤脵聢脴卤 脴篓脴搂脴鲁脴陋脴庐脴炉脴搂脵聟 脴庐脵聢脴搂脴卤脴虏脵聟脵聤脴漏 脴陋脴颅脵聢脵聤脵聞 脴搂脵聞脴拢脴颅脴卤脵聛 脴搂脵聞脵聟脴庐脴碌脴碌脴漏.

 **脵聟脵聞脴搂脴颅脴赂脴漏:** 脵聡脴掳脴搂 脴搂脵聞脴陋脴路脴篓脵聤脵聜 脵聟脴庐脴碌脴碌 脵聛脵聜脴路 脵聞脵聞脴麓脴篓脵聝脴搂脴陋 脴搂脵聞脴陋脵聤 脴陋脴篓脴炉脴拢 脴篓脵聙 `fh_` 脴拢脵聢 `wlan` 芒聙聰 脵聢脵聡脵聤 脴麓脴篓脵聝脴搂脴陋 脵聟脴麓脵聛脴卤脴漏 脴篓脴庐脵聢脴搂脴卤脴虏脵聟脵聤脴漏 脵聟脴鹿脴卤脵聢脵聛脴漏.

## 脴搂脵聞脵聟脵聟脵聤脴虏脴搂脴陋

- 脵聟脴鲁脴颅 脴麓脴篓脵聝脴搂脴陋 WiFi 脴搂脵聞脵聜脴卤脵聤脴篓脴漏
- 脴搂脴鲁脴陋脴庐脴卤脴搂脴卢 脵聝脵聞脵聟脴搂脴陋 脴搂脵聞脵聟脴卤脵聢脴卤 脵聞脵聞脴麓脴篓脵聝脴搂脴陋 脴搂脵聞脵聟脴炉脴鹿脵聢脵聟脴漏 (`fh_` / `wlan`)
- 脵聢脴搂脴卢脵聡脴漏 脴鹿脴卤脴篓脵聤脴漏 / 脴楼脵聠脴卢脵聞脵聤脴虏脵聤脴漏 / 脵聛脴卤脵聠脴鲁脵聤脴漏
- 脵聢脴露脴鹿 脴搂脵聞脵聠脵聡脴搂脴卤 脵聢脴搂脵聞脵聞脵聤脵聞 脵聟脴鹿 脵聝脴麓脵聛 脴陋脵聞脵聜脴搂脴娄脵聤 脵聟脵聠 脴搂脵聞脵聠脴赂脴搂脵聟

- 脵聠脴鲁脴庐 脵聝脵聞脵聟脴漏 脴搂脵聞脵聟脴卤脵聢脴卤

## 脴搂脵聞脴陋脵聜脵聠脵聤脴搂脴陋

| 脴搂脵聞脴陋脵聜脵聠脵聤脴漏 | 脴搂脵聞脴陋脵聛脴搂脴碌脵聤脵聞 |
